headline: You're locked in.
subheadline: Your cash-out specialist is being assigned now. Expect a text within the next few minutes from a [area code] number. They'll call you within 2 business hours (Mon-Fri 9am-6pm ET).
fallbackContactLine: Want to reach out first? Call us at (877) DSCR-NET
